channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Adds wearable claws, fangs, body tools, and animal classes for Fox, Wolf, and Hyena for now

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic crafting system that completely replaces the UI grid with a more immersive mechanic

item.title: CompostTweak
item.description: Makes composting alot more interactive and adds more things to compost.

item.title: Rivers Extended
item.description: Rivers Extended adds configurable worldgen tuning for the Rivers mod.

item.title: C&N Market
item.description: I just need a mod with currency, trade blocks and without d...

item.title: Wild Farming Fork
item.description: Cultivate flowers, herbs, mushrooms, trees, and shrubs. And much more.

item.title: TSearch
item.description: Press T on any item in your inventory or handbook to highlight nearby containers holding it.

item.title: C&N Events
item.description: Arena PvP events for Vintage Story: 1v1 duels, FFA, and Spleef...

item.title: Figurines
item.description: This mod adds Figurines

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Primitive Survival
item.description: Fishing, trapping, irrigation, smoker, nightcrawlers, snakes, and much more!

item.title: Portcullis, Drawbridges and stuff
item.description: Adds Portcullis, Drawbridges, Brazier and a working lever to add some RP to your builds.

item.title: Glowest Worms
item.description: Glowest Worms is an expansion of glow worms and many surrounding mechanics.

item.title: Ambien's Rust Teleporter
item.description: Little teleporter mod i made for a server

item.title: Storage Tweaks
item.description: Adds compact/sort and quick-unload buttons to chests and inventory.

item.title: NDL Graves
item.description: Adds graves + caskets that you respawn at (also decorative ones), tombstones that appear on death

item.title: Stop Wolf Player Hunt
item.description: Remove player from Wolf target list when hungry or during cold weather.

item.title: ParchmentToParchmentFullCopy
item.description: Makes the Transcribe button copy all pages of a parchment instead of only the currently open page

item.title: Combat Overhaul Balance
item.description: Balances the values of the Combat Overhaul mod.

item.title: CoT ClassBalance
item.description: Chronicles of Time Class Balance mod

item.title: Millwright
item.description: Building better horizontal and vertical windmills, rotors, axles, and brakes since 1386.

item.title: Mini's Assorted Patches
item.description: Buncha changes for a LAN

item.title: C&N Claims
item.description: Land protection mod.

item.title: Better coal
item.description: Changes the combustion time and temperature of the coke

item.title: Wayfinder
item.description: Make cave wall markings to help you navigate the caverns below.

item.title: Bookkeeper
item.description: Know what you have. Know where it is.

item.title: Sounds of Nature
item.description: Brings the world to life with realistic ambient wildlife audio that reacts to where you are.

item.title: Pattern Mining
item.description: Mine in 5 distinct patterns using your pickaxe.

item.title: Dumbwaiter
item.description: A medieval-style lift for moving between vertically-separated floors and storage transport.
